name: current-2024-2026-win-calibrated-championship-tail
description: Broad 2024-2026 replay testing whether no-tail win-probability calibration improves the championship tail challenger without changing its score forecasts.

notes: This branch is a calibration experiment, not a score-tail promotion by itself.
A candidate can only promote if it improves Brier/calibration without worsening the existing score and margin evidence.
